COMMENT: The MSIS ID is unique only within a state for a year; a beneficiary’s MSIS ID may change longitudinally. 
Additional details are provided in the User Guide https://www2.ccwdata.org/web/guest/user-
documentation 

This variable is encrypted in the CCW and may not be joined to any other data sets without CMS 
permission.
